Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppContainers/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerAppScaleConfig # Polyglot-friendly subset of Azure Container App scale configuration.
  MinReplicas?: number # Gets or sets the minimum number of replicas.
